extensionDescription.message: A Chrome extension that limits open tabs with playful maze games - helping you live your best tab life, one maze at a time.

popupTagline.message: Living your best tab life, one maze at a time

tip4.message: ⭐ Tip: Quality over quantity - keep only tabs you need!

tip6.message: 🚀 Tip: Less tabs = better browser performance!

tip7.message: 💪 Tip: Every maze solved is a step toward better habits!

tip8.message: 🎨 Tip: A clean tab bar is a clean mind!

welcomeHeading.message: 🎉 Welcome to Your Sincere Tab Keeper!

welcomeIntro.message: Thank you for installing Your Sincere Tab Keeper! This extension helps you build better browsing habits by limiting your open tabs.

howItWorks3.message: 📈 Track your progress and build mindful browsing habits

howItWorks4.message: 🚫 No escape hatches - only uninstalling disables the limit

peakActivityDescription.message: When you're most likely to hit your limit

aboutDescription.message: Your Sincere Tab Keeper is designed to help you reflect on your browsing habits and build a more mindful relationship with technology.

philosophyText.message: We believe that small friction can lead to big changes. By adding a playful maze game when you exceed your tab limit, we help you pause and consider whether you really need that new tab.

mazeTitle.message: Your Sincere Tab Keeper - Maze Challenge

solveMazeToOpen.message: Solve this maze to open your new tab!

solveMazeToUpdate.message: Solve this maze to update your tab limit!

motivationFooter.message: Every maze solved is a step toward more mindful browsing! 🌟

tip1Message.message: If a task takes less than 2 minutes, do it immediately instead of opening a new tab to 'remember' it later.

tip2Message.message: Focus on completing one task before opening another tab. Your brain works better with single-tasking.

tip3Message.message: That interesting article can be bookmarked for later. You don't need to keep 20 tabs open 'just in case'.

tip4Message.message: Every hour, ask yourself: 'Which of these tabs am I actually using right now?' Close the rest.

tip5Message.message: Set a 25-minute timer for focused work. When it rings, then you can check those other tabs.

tip6Message.message: Keep a notepad for quick thoughts instead of opening tabs as 'reminders'. Your future self will thank you.

tip7Message.message: Close all tabs at the end of each day. Tomorrow's work deserves a clean, focused environment.

tip8Message.message: Three focused tabs accomplish more than thirty distracted ones. Choose mindfully.

tip9Message.message: Your browser is a tool, not a storage system. Use it intentionally, not habitually.

tip10Message.message: Deep work happens in distraction-free environments. Fewer tabs = more accomplished goals.

failedToUpdateTabLimit.message: Failed to update tab limit. Please try again.

insightHighCompletionRate.message: $1% maze completion rate - you're committed to your goals!

insightLowCompletionRate.message: Consider if closing the maze tab means you didn't really need that new tab after all.
